shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: sleep indicator particle when Echo is sleeping, visualizes sleep state
context.screen_position: spawns near Echo's head (x=75, y=45), floats upward
context.usage_scenario: spawns continuously during sleeping state, 1 ZZZ visible at a time, floats upward slowly, creates peaceful sleep atmosphere

visual_specification.texture: solid color text, no internal detail

animation.description: spawns near head, moves upward 6-8px over 2 seconds, fades out in final frames, new Z spawns every 2 seconds during sleeping, slow gentle motion

visual_specification.details: purple 'Z' letter (#7E2553), 3x3px pixel font, spawns every 2 seconds during sleeping state, floats slowly upward at 3-4px/sec, disappears after 2 seconds, only 1 Z visible at a time, creates classic sleep visualization

relationships.shared_with: purple color (#7E2553) is unique to sleep particles
relationships.differences_from: slowest particle motion (2 sec lifespan vs 1 sec for others), single particle at a time (not multiples), text-based (not symbol), continuous during entire sleep state

explicit_negations: no multiple Z's at once (one at a time)
no outline or border on letter
